name: TTArtisan AF 32mm f2.8 For Nikon Z
description: A sleek and compact prime, this full-frame AF 32mm f/2.8 Lens from TTArtisans offers you a classic wide-angle field of view well-suited to cityscapes, landscapes, and street scenes.

features.Key Features:: Z-Mount Lens/Full-Frame Format | Aperture Range: f/2.8 to f/16 | One Low Dispersion Element | Two Aspherical Elements | Three High Index Elements | STM Stepping Motor | Integrated Lens Hood | USB Firmware Interface
features.What's In The Box?: TTArtisan AF 32mm f/2.8 Lens for Nikon Z | Front and Rear Lens Caps
